title: We Learn In The Retreating
content:
We learn in the retreating
    How vast an one
    Was recently among us.
    A perished sun

    Endears in the departure
    How doubly more
    Than all the golden presence
    It was before!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "We Learn In The Retreating"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
